rules.name: morning
rules.pattern: \b(woke up|wake up|got up|this morning|couldn't sleep|can't sleep|insomnia)\b
responses: How does the day feel so far?

rules.name: nighttime
rules.pattern: \b(tonight|heading to bed|going to bed|bedtime|falling asleep|can't sleep|up late|awake at)\b
responses: What are you taking to bed with you?

rules.name: progress
responses: What took the most out of you?

rules.name: uncertain
rules.pattern: I (don't know|can't decide|don't know what to)|I('m| am) (not sure|unsure|confused about|unclear on)|\b(lost on what)\b
responses: What does the uncertainty feel like?

rules.name: weather
responses: Does the weather get to you?
What do you do with a day like this?
